positive: A stylized illustration of a mystical forest guardian, centered, rendered in a high-contrast linework etching style combined with vibrant bioluminescence accents. The guardian should be an elegant mix of fauna (e.g., antlers, feathers) and flora (e.g., roots, vines), coiled and ready, depicted against a dark, moody woodland silhouette. Use deep emerald, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents for contrast. The composition must be highly clean, suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. Focus on bold outlines and clear segmentation of forms. Full body shot, symmetrical composition, dramatic rim lighting.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, grayscale only, messy, clutter
